title: epipactis helleborine subsp. schubertiorum
intro: Epipactis helleborine subsp. schubertiorum, also known as Schubert's helleborine or Schubert's orchid, is a subspecies of orchid that belongs to the Epipactis genus. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Epipactis helleborine subsp. schubertiorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
